intro: Ligularia correvoniana, also known as Japanese golden ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Japan. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, wounds, and skin conditions.
